title: Add a new label dropdown column via FORM
excerpt: Can one ADD a new label (value) to a “dropdown” via FORM, or are we only allowed to select from existing labels (values)

posts.author: GiovanniSmith (Giovanni Smith)
posts.cookedHtml: Can one ADD a new label (value) to a “dropdown” via FORM, or are we only allowed to select from existing labels (values)

posts.author: jailynnlucidday (Jai-Lynn Hoops)
posts.cookedHtml:
You can only select from existing unfortunately.

What I might suggest is an “other” field with a text field after so that someone could type in the custom field. This actually might be nice because as you get submissions you can add by popularity rather then have everything in there.

Hope this helps!

posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
